rationale: Adds 12 official Colégio Paulo de Tarso images under images/escola/ (banner-bilingue.jpg, banner-campus.png, banner-principal.jpg, banner-socioemocional.jpg, bilingue-icon.png, educacao-financeira.png, favicon-192.png, logo-colegio.png, segmento-fund1/fund2/infantil.jpeg, socioemocional-icon.png, tecnologia-icon.png) and integrates them into index.html: favicon link, header marca-logo, hero banner switched from images/semear-futuro-hero.png to images/escola/banner-principal.jpg with the AI illustration relocated to a new `<figure class='hero-card-ia glass-3d'>` overlay. Adds a new `<section id='escola' class='secao secao-escola'>` containing a campus banner with overlaid logo, kicker '// 01 · nossa escola', subtitle, two-column prose, diferenciais grid (educação financeira, programa bilíngue, socioemocional), galeria-escola (Infantil, Fundamental I, Fundamental II), and an escola-cta block with the school address and link to colegiopaulodetarso.com.br. Existing section kicker numbers are renumbered from 01-05 to 02-06 to accommodate the new section. style.css gains ~230 lines of CSS scoped to the new classes plus a media query for max-width: 900px. Pure content/design integration matching the PR body.
